not_fixed: esbuild <=0.24.2 (GHSA-67mh-4wv8-2f99: moderate, requires --force/breaking change to vite@7.3.1)
npm_audit.notes: npm audit fix (without --force) applied. The HIGH vulnerability in rollup (Path Traversal GHSA-mw96-cpmx-2vgc) is resolved. Remaining 3 moderate esbuild vulnerabilities require a breaking Vite v6→v7 upgrade and are deferred.

warnings: outDir (dist/) is outside project root (webui/) - non-blocking, by design in vite.config.js
Multiple legacy script tags without type=module could not be bundled (expected for non-ESM HTML pages)

directories: webui/src/app (9 files: actions-handler, data-loader, event-handlers, index, init, legacy-compat, notifications-handler, router, ui-controller)
webui/src/core (4 files: api-client, auth, config, logger)
webui/src/features (6 files: index, knowledge, mfa, ms365-sync, pwa, search)
webui/src/pages (8 files: approval-detail, consultation-detail, expert-detail, incident-detail, index, knowledge-detail, law-detail, page-renderer, sop-detail)
webui/src/utils (5 files: date-formatter, dom-helpers, file-utils, index, validation)

summary: HIGH脆弱性（rollup GHSA-mw96-cpmx-2vgc）をnpm audit fixで修正完了。Viteビルドは20.82秒で成功し、dist/に81ファイル（1791 KB、ソースマップ除く750 KB）を生成。13ページのHTMLと ESM/Legacy 両対応チャンク群が正常に出力された。Phase FのESMモジュール（webui/src/ 33ファイル）は50モジュールとして正常にトランスパイル・バンドルされた。
